items.briefing:
Developers at your organisation should be cautious when using GitHub, as North Korea-linked hackers are actively targeting developers through the platform. Separately, a supply chain worm called "Miasma" has been found in 73 Microsoft repositories, meaning software downloaded from those sources could be compromised. ServiceNow has also disclosed a security incident exposing customer data, so if your organisation uses ServiceNow, check for any communications from them about your account.

Microsoft has released a record-breaking Patch Tuesday update this month, addressing 206 vulnerabilities. Ensure your IT team or provider applies these updates promptly across all Windows devices.

**Tip:** If you use ServiceNow, contact your account manager to confirm whether your organisation's data was affected.

featured.title: North Korea-linked hackers target developers via GitHub
featured.quote: North Korea targets Australian developers via GitHub in coordinated phishing campaign affecting nearly 100 organisations.
